trigger._comment: 2-of-3 must hit (A: message_length ≥ this | B: wall-clock duration ≥ this | C: ≥1 user-dissatisfaction word OR ≥c2_distinct_keywords across the 4 keyword categories) for gene-evolve to invoke the CLI. message_length counts ALL messages in the slice — user, assistant, and tool_result wrappers — so one assistant turn with 3 tool calls contributes ~7. NOT the same as interaction-turn count.

inject._comment: Top-N by score = intent_score + α × category_score, where α = category_boost_alpha. Category match draws on the file's path tokens + frontmatter tags. Prompts shorter than skip_if_prompt_words_lt are bypassed.

categories._comment: Allowed top-level domains. CLI prompt feeds existing wiki dirs to LLM; this list is documentation only and not enforced.
